name: Farwil Indarys
bio:
Physical Appearance: Dunmer (Dark Elf) male wearing steel armor - boots, gauntlets, greaves, and cuirass. Wields a steel longsword and the Knights of the Thorn Shield. Wears the Indarys Signet Ring revealing his relation to the Count. Carries the Knights of the Thorn Medallion.
Race: Dunmer
Personality Keywords: dramatic, impulsive, reckless, proud
Role: Farwil Indarys is a warrior and the son of Count Andel Indarys of Cheydinhal. He is the founder of the Knights of the Thorn, an order he established to prove himself and his knights in battle.
Home Location Information: Castle Cheydinhal, as the son of the Count.
The Knights of the Thorn: Farwil founded the Knights of the Thorn and leads his order with dramatic flair. When an Oblivion Gate opened outside Cheydinhal, he led his knights into the gate in an attempt to prove themselves, rushing into battle without thinking or planning first.
Reputation: Farwil has a bad reputation around town. Mach-Na comments that "Andel Indarys doesn't help his case by having a prat for a son," reflecting the local opinion of the Count's heir.
Personality - The Impetuous Knight: Farwil has a flair for the dramatic and tends to rush right into battle without thinking or planning first. His impulsive nature and desire to prove himself lead him to make reckless decisions, such as charging into an Oblivion Gate with his knights. His behavior has earned him a poor reputation among Cheydinhal's citizens, who view him as impulsive and foolish despite his noble lineage.
author: Bethesda
